ideation: This animation sequence simulates the motion of a jockey riding a horse, focusing on the upper body movement.  Since our robot lacks a horse, we'll focus on the jockey's arm movements to convey the excitement and dynamism of horse racing.  The animation will emphasize a forward-leaning posture with arms outstretched, suggesting balance and momentum.  We'll use a combination of joint rotations to create a sense of movement and anticipation. The left arm will mimic a slight grip and the right arm will be more expressive, mimicking the jockey’s posture and the overall movement. The sequence will begin with a neutral position, gradually transition to a forward-leaning posture, then back to a more neutral position, mimicking the rhythm of a horse race. The sequence will end with a subtle return to a neutral pose, suggesting the end of the race or a brief pause between strides.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, ready for the race
leaning into the gallop, arms pumping rhythmically
a steady forward posture, maintaining balance
arms settle back, the ride concludes
